statusLine.command: jq -r '"\u001b[" as $e | (.context_window.used_percentage // 0 | floor) as $pct | (.context_window.context_window_size // 200000) as $total | (($pct * $total / 100 / 1000) | floor | tostring) as $usedK | ($total / 1000 | floor | tostring) as $totalK | (($pct * 20 / 100) | floor) as $filled | (if $pct < 50 then "32" elif $pct < 80 then "33" else "31" end) as $barColor | ("\($e)\($barColor)m\("█" * $filled)\($e)90m\("░" * (20 - $filled))\($e)0m") as $bar | ((.cost.total_cost_usd // 0) * 100 | round / 100 | tostring) as $cost | "\($bar) \($e)\($barColor)m\($pct)%\($e)0m \($e)90m(\($usedK)k/\($totalK)k)\($e)0m · \($e)32m$\($cost)\($e)0m · \($e)36m\(.model.display_name)\($e)0m · \($e)34m'"$(pwd)"'\($e)0m"'
